name: Los Venganza Del Almo Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Wesson oil or 1/2 cup kidney suet
1 tablespoon Mole (powdered), also called mole poblano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, add paprika, oregano, MSG, chili powder, cumin, beef bouillon, beer and 2 cups water. Let simmer.
2. In a separate skillet, brown meat in 2 lb or 3 lb batches with Wesson oil or suet. Drain and add to the simmering spices. Continue until all meat is done.
3. Saute chopped onion and garlic in 1 tablespoon oil or suet. Add to the spices and meat mixture. Add water as needed. Simmer for 2 hours.
4. Add mole, sugar, coriander seed, hot sauce and tomato sauce. Simmer for 45 minutes.
5. Dissolve masa harina flour in warm water to form a paste. Add to the chili. Add salt to taste. Simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Add additional Louisiana Hot Sauce for hotter taste. Makes 1 pot.
